description: Normalize (normalize_total), log1p, select highly variable genes, and optionally regress out covariates and scale. Keeps raw counts in layers['counts'] and the normalized log matrix in adata.raw so downstream marker/expression plots can use use_raw=True.
rules: takes QC-filtered raw counts; produces a normalized, log1p object ready for dimensionality reduction
read-only input — writes a new normalized.h5ad + HVG plot under record_store
FLAVOR seurat_v3 selects HVGs on raw counts before normalization; seurat/cell_ranger after
REGRESS_OUT is a space-separated list of obs columns (e.g. 'total_counts pct_counts_mt')
usage: Set INPUT. Optional: TARGET_SUM, N_TOP_GENES, FLAVOR (seurat|cell_ranger|seurat_v3), BATCH_KEY, SUBSET_HVG=1, REGRESS_OUT, SCALE=1, NO_PLOTS=1. Output: normalized.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder normalized.h5ad and still passes.
